targets.queryText: SELECT twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT benchmark_twr_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT benchmark_twr_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT excess_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT excess_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT corr_1y AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT corr_1y AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT beta_portfolio AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT beta_portfolio AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT tracking_error_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tracking_error_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT information_ratio_1y AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT information_ratio_1y AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT alpha_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT alpha_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, benchmark_twr_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, benchmark_twr_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT '1 Month' AS period, ROUND(twr_1m_pct, 2) AS portfolio, ROUND(benchmark_twr_1m_pct, 2) AS benchmark, ROUND(excess_1m_pct, 2) AS excess FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT '3 Months', ROUND(twr_3m_pct, 2), ROUND(benchmark_twr_3m_pct, 2), ROUND(excess_3m_pct, 2) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT '1 Year', ROUND(twr_12m_pct, 2), ROUND(benchmark_twr_1y_pct, 2), ROUND(excess_1y_pct, 2) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT '1 Month' AS period, ROUND(twr_1m_pct, 2) AS portfolio, ROUND(benchmark_twr_1m_pct, 2) AS benchmark, ROUND(excess_1m_pct, 2) AS excess FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT '3 Months', ROUND(twr_3m_pct, 2), ROUND(benchmark_twr_3m_pct, 2), ROUND(excess_3m_pct, 2) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT '1 Year', ROUND(twr_12m_pct, 2), ROUND(benchmark_twr_1y_pct, 2), ROUND(excess_1y_pct, 2) FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
